# Orbit spacing

A single spacing scale, exposed twice: bare numeric steps and named aliases that
point at them. Use the **named aliases** in components for intent
(`var(--orbit-space-base)`), the numeric steps when a specific value is needed.

## Scale

| Step | Value | CSS variable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `0` | 0px | `var(--orbit-space-0)` |
| `1` | 4px | `var(--orbit-space-1)` |
| `2` | 8px | `var(--orbit-space-2)` |
| `4` | 16px | `var(--orbit-space-4)` |
| `6` | 24px | `var(--orbit-space-6)` |
| `8` | 32px | `var(--orbit-space-8)` |
| `12` | 48px | `var(--orbit-space-12)` |
| `16` | 64px | `var(--orbit-space-16)` |
| `px` | 1px | `var(--orbit-space-px)` |
| `0_5` | 2px | `var(--orbit-space-0_5)` |

## Named aliases

| Alias | Value | CSS variable | Maps to step |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `none` | 0px | `var(--orbit-space-none)` | `0` |
| `micro` | 1px | `var(--orbit-space-micro)` | `px` |
| `xxs` | 2px | `var(--orbit-space-xxs)` | `0_5` |
| `xs` | 4px | `var(--orbit-space-xs)` | `1` |
| `s` | 8px | `var(--orbit-space-s)` | `2` |
| `base` | 16px | `var(--orbit-space-base)` | `4` |
| `m` | 24px | `var(--orbit-space-m)` | `6` |
| `l` | 32px | `var(--orbit-space-l)` | `8` |
| `xxl` | 48px | `var(--orbit-space-xxl)` | `12` |
| `mega` | 64px | `var(--orbit-space-mega)` | `16` |
